acid.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a vial of Acid. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 + your Dexterity modifier + Proficiency Bonus) or take 2d6 Acid damage.
acid.name: Acid

alchemists-fire.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Alchemist's Fire. Target one creature or object you can see within 20 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 + DEX mod + PB) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.
alchemists-fire.name: Alchemist's Fire

alchemists-supplies.description: Alchemist's Supplies let you produce useful concoctions, such as Acid or Alchemist's Fire.
alchemists-supplies.name: Alchemist's Supplies

antitoxin.description: As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.
antitoxin.name: Antitoxin

arcane-focus.description: A crystal, orb, rod, staff, or wand that channels arcane magic, usable as a spellcasting focus.
arcane-focus.name: Arcane Focus

arrows.description: Ammunition for bows. Sold in bundles of 20.
arrows.name: Arrows

backpack.description: A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.
backpack.name: Backpack

bagpipes.description: Bagpipes are a wind instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play them.
bagpipes.name: Bagpipes

ball-bearings.description: As a Utilize action, you can spill Ball Bearings to cover a level, 10-foot-square area within 10 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or have the Prone condition.
ball-bearings.name: Ball Bearings

basket.name: Basket
basket.description: A Basket holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

bedroll.description: A Bedroll sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold.
bedroll.name: Bedroll

bell.description: When rung as a Utilize action, a Bell produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.
bell.name: Bell

blanket.description: While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold.
blanket.name: Blanket

block-and-tackle.name: Block and Tackle
block-and-tackle.description: A Block and Tackle lets you hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

blowgun-needles.description: Ammunition for blowguns. Sold in bundles of 50.
blowgun-needles.name: Blowgun Needles

book.description: A Book might contain poetry, historical accounts, scientific theories, or information on almost any subject. A Warlock's Book holds occult lore.
book.name: Book

brewers-supplies.description: Brewer's Supplies are used to ferment beverages and purify water.
brewers-supplies.name: Brewer's Supplies

bucket.name: Bucket
bucket.description: A Bucket holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

burglars-pack.description: Contains: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, 10 Candles, Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, 7 flasks of Oil, 5 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.
burglars-pack.name: Burglar's Pack

calligraphers-supplies.description: Calligrapher's Supplies are used to write with elegant, precise lettering.
calligraphers-supplies.name: Calligrapher's Supplies

caltrops.description: As a Utilize action, you can spread Caltrops to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. A creature that enters this area must succeed on a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw or take 1 Piercing damage and have its Speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.
caltrops.name: Caltrops

candle.description: For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.
candle.name: Candle

carpenters-tools.description: Carpenter's Tools are used to build and repair wooden structures and objects.
carpenters-tools.name: Carpenter's Tools

cartographers-tools.description: Cartographer's Tools are used to create and read maps.
cartographers-tools.name: Cartographer's Tools

chain.description: As a Utilize action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition (DC 13 Strength Athletics check). Escaping requires DC 18 Dexterity (Acrobatics), bursting requires DC 20 Strength (Athletics).
chain.name: Chain

climbers-kit.description: Includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, you can anchor yourself; you can't fall more than 25 feet from the anchor point.
climbers-kit.name: Climber's Kit

clothes-fine.description: Fine Clothes are made of expensive fabrics. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.
clothes-fine.name: Clothes, Fine

clothes-travelers.description: Traveler's Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.
clothes-travelers.name: Clothes, Traveler's

cobblers-tools.description: Cobbler's Tools are used to make and repair footwear.
cobblers-tools.name: Cobbler's Tools

component-pouch.description: A Component Pouch is watertight and filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.
component-pouch.name: Component Pouch

cooks-utensils.description: Cook's Utensils are used to prepare meals.
cooks-utensils.name: Cook's Utensils

costume.description: An elaborate outfit worn as a disguise or for a performance.
costume.name: Costume

crossbow-bolts.description: Ammunition for crossbows. Sold in bundles of 20.
crossbow-bolts.name: Crossbow Bolts

crowbar.description: Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where the Crowbar's leverage can be applied.
crowbar.name: Crowbar

dice-set.description: A Dice Set is a gaming set. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play a game that uses it.
dice-set.name: Dice Set

diplomats-pack.description: Contains: Chest, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Lamp, 2 Map or Scroll Cases, 4 flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Paper, 5 sheets of Parchment, Perfume, and Tinderbox.
diplomats-pack.name: Diplomat's Pack

disguise-kit.description: A Disguise Kit contains cosmetics, hair dye, small props, and a few pieces of clothing. Proficiency with it lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to Charisma (Deception) checks made to create visual disguises.
disguise-kit.name: Disguise Kit

druidic-focus.description: A sprig of mistletoe, a totem, a wooden staff, or a yew wand, usable as a spellcasting focus for druid spells.
druidic-focus.name: Druidic Focus

drum.description: A Drum is a percussion instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
drum.name: Drum

dulcimer.description: A Dulcimer is a stringed instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
dulcimer.name: Dulcimer

dungeoneers-pack.description: Contains: Backpack, Caltrops, Crowbar, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.
dungeoneers-pack.name: Dungeoneer's Pack

entertainers-pack.description: Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, 3 Costumes, Mirror, 8 flasks of Oil, 9 days of Rations, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.
entertainers-pack.name: Entertainer's Pack

explorers-pack.description: Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.
explorers-pack.name: Explorer's Pack

flute.description: A Flute is a wind instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
flute.name: Flute

forgery-kit.description: A Forgery Kit is used to create convincing fakes of documents and other physical items.
forgery-kit.name: Forgery Kit

glass-bottle.name: Glass Bottle
glass-bottle.description: A Glass Bottle holds up to 1½ pints.

glassblowers-tools.description: Glassblower's Tools are used to shape glass.
glassblowers-tools.name: Glassblower's Tools

grappling-hook.description: As a Utilize action, you can throw the Grappling Hook at a railing, ledge, or other catch within 50 feet (DC 13 Dexterity Acrobatics check). If you tied a Rope to the hook, you can then climb it.
grappling-hook.name: Grappling Hook

healers-kit.description: Has ten uses. As a Utilize action, you can expend one use to stabilize an Unconscious creature at 0 Hit Points without needing a Wisdom (Medicine) check.
healers-kit.name: Healer's Kit

herbalism-kit.description: An Herbalism Kit includes pouches to store herbs, clippers and leather gloves for collecting plants, a mortar and pestle, and several vials. Proficiency with it lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to checks made to identify or apply herbs and other natural remedies, and to craft antitoxin and healing potions.
herbalism-kit.name: Herbalism Kit

holy-symbol.description: An amulet, emblem, or reliquary bearing a deity's symbol, usable as a spellcasting focus for cleric and paladin spells.
holy-symbol.name: Holy Symbol

holy-water.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing a flask of Holy Water at a creature within 20 feet. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 + DEX mod + PB) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or Undead.
holy-water.name: Holy Water

horn.description: A Horn is a wind instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
horn.name: Horn

hunting-trap.description: As a Utilize action, set the trap. A creature that steps on it must succeed on a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have Speed reduced to 0. Escaping requires a DC 13 Strength (Athletics) check.
hunting-trap.name: Hunting Trap

ink.description: Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.
ink.name: Ink

ink-pen.name: Ink Pen
ink-pen.description: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

iron-pot.name: Iron Pot
iron-pot.description: An Iron Pot holds up to 1 gallon.

iron-spikes.name: Iron Spikes
iron-spikes.description: Iron Spikes come in bundles of ten. You can hammer one in to jam a door shut or to tie off a Rope or Chain.

jewelers-tools.description: Jeweler's Tools are used to cut and set gemstones.
jewelers-tools.name: Jeweler's Tools

ladder.name: Ladder
ladder.description: A Ladder is 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

lamp.description: A Lamp burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.
lamp.name: Lamp

lantern-bullseye.description: Burns Oil to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.
lantern-bullseye.name: Lantern, Bullseye

lantern-hooded.description: Burns Oil to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, lower the hood to reduce to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.
lantern-hooded.name: Lantern, Hooded

leatherworkers-tools.description: Leatherworker's Tools are used to make and repair leather goods.
leatherworkers-tools.name: Leatherworker's Tools

lock.description: A Lock comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can pick it with Thieves' Tools (DC 15 Dexterity Sleight of Hand check).
lock.name: Lock

lute.description: A Lute is a stringed musical instrument. Proficiency with it lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to Charisma (Performance) checks that rely on the lute.
lute.name: Lute

lyre.description: A Lyre is a stringed instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
lyre.name: Lyre

manacles.description: As a Utilize action, bind an unwilling creature that has the Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained condition (DC 13 Dexterity Sleight of Hand). Escaping requires DC 20 Dexterity (Sleight of Hand); bursting requires DC 25 Strength (Athletics).
manacles.name: Manacles

map.name: Map
map.description: Consulting an accurate Map gives a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks to find your way in the place it depicts.

map-or-scroll-case.name: Map or Scroll Case
map-or-scroll-case.description: A Map or Scroll Case holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

masons-tools.description: Mason's Tools are used to build with stone.
masons-tools.name: Mason's Tools

mirror.description: A handheld steel Mirror useful for personal cosmetics, peeking around corners, and reflecting light as a signal.
mirror.name: Mirror

musical-instrument.description: A lute, flute, drum, or other instrument. A bard can use it as a spellcasting focus.
musical-instrument.name: Musical Instrument

navigators-tools.description: Navigator's Tools are used to chart a course and follow navigation charts.
navigators-tools.name: Navigator's Tools

net.description: When you take the Attack action, you can replace one attack with throwing a Net at a creature within 15 feet. Target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 + DEX mod + PB) or have the Restrained condition. Target succeeds automatically if Huge or larger. Escaping: DC 10 Strength (Athletics) check. Net: AC 10, 5 HP.
net.name: Net

oil.description: Douse a creature within 20 feet (Dexterity save, DC 8 + DEX mod + PB). If target takes Fire damage within 1 minute, it takes extra 5 Fire damage. Also serves as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns (burns 6 hours).
oil.name: Oil

painters-supplies.description: Painter's Supplies are used to create paintings.
painters-supplies.name: Painter's Supplies

pan-flute.description: A Pan Flute is a wind instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
pan-flute.name: Pan Flute

paper.name: Paper
paper.description: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

parchment.name: Parchment
parchment.description: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

perfume.description: A small vial of pleasant-smelling perfume.
perfume.name: Perfume

playing-card-set.description: A Playing Card Set is a gaming set. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play a game that uses it.
playing-card-set.name: Playing Card Set

poison-basic.description: As a Bonus Action, coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature that takes Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon/ammo takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Lasts 1 minute or until damage is dealt.
poison-basic.name: Poison, Basic

poisoners-kit.description: A Poisoner's Kit includes the vials, chemicals, and other equipment necessary for the creation of poisons. Proficiency with it lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to the checks you make to craft poisons.
poisoners-kit.name: Poisoner's Kit

pole.name: Pole
pole.description: A Pole is 10 feet long. You can use it to touch something up to 10 feet away or to vault with Advantage on a jump check.

portable-ram.name: Portable Ram
portable-ram.description: A Portable Ram grants a +4 bonus to Strength checks made to break down a door; a helper grants Advantage.

potters-tools.description: Potter's Tools are used to shape and fire clay.
potters-tools.name: Potter's Tools

pouch.name: Pouch
pouch.description: A Pouch holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

priests-pack.description: Contains: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.
priests-pack.name: Priest's Pack

quiver.description: A case that holds up to 20 arrows.
quiver.name: Quiver

rations.description: Rations consist of travel-ready food for one day, including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts.
rations.name: Rations

robe.description: A loose, flowing outer garment, often worn by spellcasters.
robe.name: Robe

rope.description: 50 feet of rope. As a Utilize action, tie a knot (DC 10 Dexterity Sleight of Hand). Can be burst (DC 20 Strength Athletics). Can bind creatures that are Grappled, Incapacitated, or Restrained (DC 15 Dexterity Acrobatics to escape).
rope.name: Rope

scholars-pack.description: Contains: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, 10 flasks of Oil, 10 sheets of Parchment, and Tinderbox.
scholars-pack.name: Scholar's Pack

shawm.description: A Shawm is a wind instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
shawm.name: Shawm

shovel.description: Working for 1 hour, you can dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.
shovel.name: Shovel

signal-whistle.name: Signal Whistle
signal-whistle.description: When blown as a Utilize action, a Signal Whistle produces a sound heard up to 600 feet away.

sling-bullets.description: Ammunition for slings. Sold in bundles of 20.
sling-bullets.name: Sling Bullets

smiths-tools.description: Smith's Tools are used to forge and repair metal items.
smiths-tools.name: Smith's Tools

spellbook.description: Essential for Wizards, a Spellbook is a leather-bound tome with 100 blank vellum pages suitable for recording spells.
spellbook.name: Spellbook

string.name: String
string.description: String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

tent.description: A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.
tent.name: Tent

thieves-tools.description: Thieves' Tools include a small file, a set of lock picks, a small mirror mounted on a metal handle, a set of narrow-bladed scissors, and a pair of pliers. Proficiency with them lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to Dexterity checks made to pick locks or disarm traps.
thieves-tools.name: Thieves' Tools

tinderbox.description: Holds flint, fire steel, and tinder. Lighting a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.
tinderbox.name: Tinderbox

tinkers-tools.description: A set of tools for making and repairing small objects and mechanisms.
tinkers-tools.name: Tinker's Tools

torch.description: Burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. Can be used as a Simple Melee weapon dealing 1 Fire damage on a hit.
torch.name: Torch

vial.name: Vial
vial.description: A Vial holds up to 4 ounces.

viol.description: A Viol is a stringed instrument. Proficiency lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to ability checks you make to play it.
viol.name: Viol

waterskin.description: A Waterskin holds up to 4 pints of water.
waterskin.name: Waterskin

weavers-tools.description: Weaver's Tools are used to make cloth.
weavers-tools.name: Weaver's Tools

woodcarvers-tools.description: Woodcarver's Tools consist of a knife, a gouge, and a small saw. Proficiency with them lets you add your Proficiency Bonus to checks made to carve objects from wood.
woodcarvers-tools.name: Woodcarver's Tools
